const d = $json;
return { json: { recordId: d.id, company_name: d['Company Name']||'', company_url: d['Company URL']||'', description: d['Company Description']||'', source: d['VC Firm']||d['Source']||'Unknown', searchQuery: '"' + (d['Company Name']||'') + '" company funding employees' } };
